answer:
The restricted stock plan for non-management directors had 159,965 shares available as of September 30, 2018. In 2018, the company awarded 12,228 shares of restricted stock and 2,038 restricted stock units, totaling 14,266 shares issued that year. Dividing the available shares by the annual issuance gives 159,965 ÷ 14,266 ≈ 11.21 years.

\boxed{11.21}
